basics.name: Your Name
basics.headline: DevOps Automation Engineer | Blockchain Infrastructure Specialist

items.name: Process Automation Excellence
items.summary: Reduced manual workload by 80% through automated monitoring and notification systems across 500+ Bitcoin ATM network

items.name: Revenue Impact & Growth
items.summary: Increased customer review collection by 300% driving business reputation and sales through automated engagement systems

items.name: Operational Excellence
items.summary: Achieved 95%+ uptime across distributed cryptocurrency ATM network through proactive monitoring and automated alert systems

items.name: Innovation Leadership
items.summary: Built enterprise-grade solutions using AI-assisted development, reverse-engineered APIs, and cutting-edge automation frameworks

summary.name: Professional Summary
summary.content: Innovative DevOps Automation Engineer with 5+ years of experience transforming manual operations into scalable, automated solutions. Proven track record of building enterprise-grade monitoring systems, blockchain transaction processors, and customer engagement platforms that drive both operational efficiency and revenue growth. Expert in AI-assisted development, API integration, and reverse engineering complex systems. Seeking to leverage automation expertise and problem-solving skills in a senior technical role where I can continue building cutting-edge solutions that optimize workflows and drive business impact.

items.name: Blockchain ATM Transaction Monitoring & Review Automation System
items.summary:
• Impact: Automated customer review collection increasing feedback by 300% and improving business reputation

  • Architecture: Built full-stack Node.js application with Express.js backend, SQLite database, and real-time Socket.IO dashboard

  • Blockchain Integration: Implemented multi-cryptocurrency support (BTC, ETH, USDC, USDT, LTC) with automated confirmation tracking

  • Communication Systems: Integrated Telegram Bot API and Zendesk for automated customer outreach and review requests

  • Analytics: Built comprehensive tracking system for review lifecycle, click analytics, and customer engagement metrics

items.name: Real-Time Kiosk Monitoring Dashboard
items.summary:
• Scale: Monitors 500+ Bitcoin ATMs across the United States with 95%+ uptime achievement

  • Real-time Operations: Built background workflow system running every 10 minutes to detect and alert on hardware issues

  • Emergency Response: Automated Telegram notifications for critical issues, reducing response time by 70%

  • Visualization: Created interactive maps, charts, and analytics dashboard for operations team

  • Data Management: Implemented SQLite-based historical tracking and issue analytics system

items.name: Enterprise API Reverse Engineering & Integration
items.summary:
• Innovation: Reverse engineered proprietary APIs by analyzing network traffic and creating comprehensive API documentation

  • Authentication: Built automated token management system with refresh capabilities for sustained API access

  • Integration: Created robust API wrapper libraries enabling seamless data exchange and automation

  • Security: Implemented secure credential management and error handling for production environments

items.name: OpenWRT Network Infrastructure Optimization
items.summary:
• Custom Configuration: Built enterprise-grade router solution on OpenWRT/x86 platform for enhanced network performance

  • Security Implementation: Applied advanced firewall configurations, QoS management, and VPN integration

  • Performance Optimization: Achieved 40% improvement in network throughput through traffic management and optimization

• Associate of Applied Science (AAS): 1 course remaining, transitioning to Bachelor's degree program

  • Core Competencies: Data Communications, Information Security, Database Design, Programming Fundamentals

  • Specialized Coursework: Linux/UNIX Administration, Web Standards, Network Management, Algorithm Design

  • Practical Application: Applied coursework knowledge directly to real-world automation projects and system optimization

• Automation Engineering: Transformed manual operational processes into automated systems, reducing manual workload by 80% and improving response times by 70%

  • Enterprise Architecture: Designed and built full-stack monitoring applications serving 500+ Bitcoin ATMs with real-time dashboard capabilities and automated alert systems

  • Revenue Impact: Developed customer engagement automation that increased review collection by 300%, directly contributing to business growth and reputation management

  • API Development: Reverse engineered proprietary systems to create robust API integrations, enabling seamless data flow and automation across business processes

  • Team Leadership: Managed distributed contractor network via FieldNation platform, optimizing technician deployment and reducing average issue resolution time

  • Innovation Driver: Pioneered use of AI-assisted development tools (Cursor, GitHub Copilot) to rapidly prototype and deploy production-ready solutions

items.name: CompTIA A+
items.summary: Core 1 & Core 2 - Hardware and software troubleshooting, networking, and security fundamentals

items.name: CompTIA Security+
items.summary: Cybersecurity fundamentals, risk management, and security architecture
